title: [Immunophenotyping of lung tumors : An update].
abstract: The WHO Classification of Lung Tumors (2015) established the use of immunohistochemical stainings for resection specimens, however, detailed recommendations had been missing. Now, an international expert panel has summarized key questions for daily routine practice and provided recommendations to assist the community in the appropriate use of immunohistochemistry in this context. This article provides an overview of the most important aspects.
